name: matkorgen
description: Grocery shopping MCP server for Swedish stores. Search products, manage your cart, view favourites and purchase history. Currently supports ICA.

settings.name: ICA Store ID
settings.description: Default ICA store ID (e.g. 1003577). Optional — you can also set it at runtime via the set_store tool.

settings.name: ICA Username
settings.description: Your ICA account username/email. Required for cart, favourites, and purchase history.
